_comment: PyPepper Lithos adoption manifest. A declaration of conformance, not an authorization: it grants no permission and clears no approval gate. Field reference: Lithos docs/conformance-and-fixtures.md.

conformance_claim.statement: PyPepper conforms to Lithos 1.x under the full-lifecycle governance model on the test/lithos-adoption-effects evaluation branch.

architect.assigned_to: Hermes (evaluation plan and acceptance criteria), owner sign-off

verifier.assigned_to: Codex CLI and Hermes (independent of implementation)

knowledge_governance.evidence_retention: Development logs, lessons, practices, and verification outputs live under docs/ and in the branch pull-request thread for the life of this evaluation branch.
knowledge_governance.stale_knowledge_handling: use-driven validation; archived, superseded, and deprecated records are immutable
